tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check if the Canvas API is reachable and the token is valid. Returns ok/error status.

tools.name: list_courses
tools.description: List courses for the authenticated user. Optionally filter by enrollment state.

tools.name: get_course
tools.description: Get details for a single course by ID, including term and total student count.

tools.name: get_syllabus
tools.description: Get the syllabus HTML body for a course.

tools.name: create_course
tools.description: Create a new course in a Canvas account. Returns the created course object.

tools.name: update_course
tools.description: Update an existing course. Only provided fields are changed; omitted fields are left as-is.

tools.name: list_assignments
tools.description: List all assignments in a course.

tools.name: get_assignment
tools.description: Get details for a single assignment by ID.

tools.name: list_assignment_groups
tools.description: List assignment groups (categories like Homework, Exams) in a course.

tools.name: create_assignment
tools.description: Create a new assignment in a course.

tools.name: update_assignment
tools.description: Update an existing assignment in a course.

tools.name: delete_assignment
tools.description: Delete an assignment from a course.

tools.name: list_submissions
tools.description: List all submissions for an assignment in a course.

tools.name: get_submission
tools.description: Get a single submission for a specific user on an assignment, including comments.

tools.name: grade_submission
tools.description: Post or update a grade for a submission. Requires grading permissions.

tools.name: comment_on_submission
tools.description: Add a text comment to a submission.

tools.name: list_rubrics
tools.description: List all rubrics in a course.

tools.name: get_rubric
tools.description: Get details for a single rubric by ID, including criteria.

tools.name: get_rubric_assessment
tools.description: Get the rubric assessment for a specific student submission on an assignment.

tools.name: submit_rubric_assessment
tools.description: Submit a rubric assessment with scores and comments for each criterion.

tools.name: list_quizzes
tools.description: List all quizzes in a course.

tools.name: get_quiz
tools.description: Get details for a single quiz by ID.

tools.name: list_quiz_submissions
tools.description: List all submissions for a quiz.

tools.name: list_quiz_questions
tools.description: List all questions in a quiz.

tools.name: get_quiz_submission_answers
tools.description: Get a student's answers for a quiz submission.

tools.name: score_quiz_question
tools.description: Score a specific question in a quiz submission. Specify attempt to score a particular attempt (omit for latest). Requires grading permissions.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List all files in a course.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List all folders in a course.

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Get metadata for a single file by ID, including download URL.

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a file to a course. Content must be base64-encoded. Canvas performs a multi-step upload internally.

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file by ID. This action is permanent.

tools.name: list_students
tools.description: List all students enrolled in a course.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get details for a single user by ID.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user.

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search for users in a Canvas account by name, login, or email.

tools.name: list_course_users
tools.description: List all users in a course, optionally filtered by enrollment type.

tools.name: list_groups
tools.description: List all groups in a course.

tools.name: list_group_members
tools.description: List all members of a group.

tools.name: list_enrollments
tools.description: List all enrollments for the authenticated user across courses.

tools.name: enroll_user
tools.description: Enroll a user in a course with a specified role.

tools.name: remove_enrollment
tools.description: Remove or conclude an enrollment from a course.

tools.name: list_discussions
tools.description: List all discussion topics in a course.

tools.name: get_discussion
tools.description: Get details for a single discussion topic by ID.

tools.name: list_announcements
tools.description: List all announcements in a course.

tools.name: post_discussion_entry
tools.description: Post a new entry (reply) to a discussion topic.

tools.name: create_discussion
tools.description: Create a new discussion topic in a course.

tools.name: update_discussion
tools.description: Update an existing discussion topic.

tools.name: delete_discussion
tools.description: Delete a discussion topic from a course.

tools.name: list_modules
tools.description: List all modules in a course.

tools.name: get_module
tools.description: Get details for a single module by ID.

tools.name: list_module_items
tools.description: List all items within a module.

tools.name: create_module
tools.description: Create a new module in a course.

tools.name: update_module
tools.description: Update an existing module (rename, reposition, publish/unpublish).

tools.name: create_module_item
tools.description: Add an item (Assignment, Page, Quiz, File, Discussion, ExternalUrl, ExternalTool, SubHeader) to a module.

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List all wiki pages in a course.

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Get a single wiki page by its URL slug.

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new wiki page in a course.

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update an existing wiki page.

tools.name: delete_page
tools.description: Delete a wiki page from a course.

tools.name: list_calendar_events
tools.description: List calendar events for a course.

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a new calendar event in Canvas.

tools.name: update_calendar_event
tools.description: Update an existing calendar event. Only provided fields are changed.

tools.name: list_conversations
tools.description: List conversations (inbox messages) for the authenticated user.

tools.name: get_conversation
tools.description: Get a single conversation with its full message thread.

tools.name: get_conversation_unread_count
tools.description: Get the number of unread conversations for the authenticated user.

tools.name: send_conversation
tools.description: Send a new conversation message to one or more recipients.

tools.name: list_peer_reviews
tools.description: List all peer reviews for an assignment in a course.

tools.name: get_submission_peer_reviews
tools.description: List peer reviews assigned to a specific submission.

tools.name: create_peer_review
tools.description: Assign a user to peer-review a submission.

tools.name: delete_peer_review
tools.description: Remove a peer review assignment from a submission.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get details for a Canvas account by ID.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all accounts accessible to the authenticated user.

tools.name: list_sub_accounts
tools.description: List sub-accounts under a given Canvas account.

tools.name: list_account_courses
tools.description: List courses under a given Canvas account.

tools.name: list_account_users
tools.description: List users in a Canvas account.

tools.name: get_account_reports
tools.description: List available report types for a Canvas account.

tools.name: search_course_content
tools.description: Search for content within a course. Searches pages, assignments, discussions, and announcements by keyword.

tools.name: get_course_analytics
tools.description: Get course-level activity analytics. Returns daily page view and participation counts.

tools.name: get_student_analytics
tools.description: Get per-student activity analytics for a course. Returns page views, participations, and submission timeline for a specific student.

tools.name: get_course_activity_stream
tools.description: Get a summary of recent activity in a course. Returns counts of recent events grouped by type (submissions, discussions, announcements, etc.).

tools.name: get_root_outcome_group
tools.description: Get the root outcome group for an account or course context.

tools.name: list_outcome_groups
tools.description: List all outcome groups for an account or course context.

tools.name: list_outcome_group_links
tools.description: List all outcome links in an account or course context.

tools.name: get_outcome_group
tools.description: Get details for a specific outcome group in an account or course context.

tools.name: list_outcome_group_outcomes
tools.description: List the linked outcomes directly under a specific outcome group.

tools.name: list_outcome_group_subgroups
tools.description: List the immediate child outcome groups under a specific outcome group.

tools.name: get_outcome
tools.description: Get the full details for a specific learning outcome by ID.

tools.name: get_outcome_alignments
tools.description: Get outcome alignments for a course, optionally filtered to a specific student or assignment.

tools.name: get_outcome_results
tools.description: Get per-student outcome results for a course, with optional outcome, student, and alignment filters.

tools.name: get_outcome_rollups
tools.description: Get outcome rollups for a course, optionally aggregated or filtered by students, outcomes, and sort options.

tools.name: get_outcome_contributing_scores
tools.description: Get assignment or quiz scores that contributed to a specific outcome for one or more students in a course.

tools.name: get_outcome_mastery_distribution
tools.description: Get mastery distribution analytics for outcomes in a course, optionally filtered by students or outcomes.

tools.name: get_my_courses
tools.description: List active courses for the authenticated student.

tools.name: get_my_grades
tools.description: Get grade data for the authenticated student. If course_id is omitted, returns grades across all enrolled courses.

tools.name: get_my_submissions
tools.description: List all submissions for the authenticated student in a course.

tools.name: get_my_upcoming_assignments
tools.description: List upcoming assignment events for the authenticated student.

tools.name: get_dashboard_cards
tools.description: Get the current user's dashboard course cards with position, color, and image.

tools.name: get_todo_items
tools.description: Get the current user's to-do items, including upcoming assignments and grading tasks.

tools.name: get_upcoming_events
tools.description: Get the current user's upcoming calendar events and assignments.

tools.name: get_missing_submissions
tools.description: Get assignments with missing submissions for the current user.
